item.title: Father's Day Land Deals ☀️ 3 Florida Lots From $199 Down
item.description:
Lamarr called me from Philadelphia earlier this week. He's a dad — and he's thinking like one. Not a vacation. Not a gadget. He wants land for a family compound — a place where his kids have room to run, his parents can come and stay, and his brothers and cousins have somewhere to land when they visit. Multiple structures on one property. Room for the nuclear family and the extended family. No landlord. No HOA. No one telling the family what it can and can't do on its own piece of Florida.

Watch: how owner financing works →

We found him three Florida properties that checked every box. All three are still available today with owner financing and no credit check required.

And if you want to build a family compound on Florida land —

4 Acres in Florida's Lake Country, Interlachen — 3.96 acres zoned R-2 Two Family. Two separate homes, one parcel. Tiny home next to the main structure. Guest cottage for parents and cousins. Rental unit while you plan the build. Mobile, manufactured, site-built, or container — all welcome, no HOA. Interlachen has 37 freshwater lakes in its town limits, Rodman Reservoir for bass fishing, Ocala National Forest close by, Palatka 16 miles east. On Freedom Days sale now, 25% off the cash price. $1,999 down, $1,423/mo.

3.96 acres in Interlachen, FL — R-2 zoning, 37 nearby lakes, no HOA. $1,999 down locks it in.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

1.1 Acres Near the Suwannee River, Jennings — Agriculture-4 zoning at the top of Florida's map. Raise animals, grow food, build a home without asking anyone's permission. The Suwannee runs close by. Valdosta, Georgia is 25 miles north. North Florida ag land this affordable is quietly becoming rare, and this lot is on Freedom Days with 25% off the cash price right now. $499 down, $401/mo.

See All 3 Listings →

If you want maximum flexibility and the lowest possible entry —

1.47 Acres in Hastings, Flagler County — R-1 Rural residential at $199 down. St. Augustine is about 40 miles east. Daytona Beach is south. Build, plant, camp, or hold it while you plan the next move. It's the lowest barrier of the three and a clean entry into northeast Florida land. $199 down, $342/mo.

Lamarr flies down in a few weeks to walk the Interlachen lot. If you're a dad who's been carrying this picture, this is the week to act. The best Father's Day gift isn't wrapped.

Not sure which lot fits? Book a free Land Intro Call at introcall.lotsofsunshine.com — 15 minutes, no pressure.

item.title: Farm Land ☀️ in Palatka From $499 Down
item.description:
Berto called me from Tampa looking for land where he could raise animals, place a home, and stop renting.

Es un cliente de habla hispana que nos encontró en Facebook. Trabajó con Eric — nuestro asesor de terrenos de habla hispana — para responder cada pregunta. La más importante antes de comprometerse: "¿Está en zona de inundación?"

Buena pregunta. Eso es exactamente lo que me dice que alguien va en serio.

Berto found his answer in Palatka. Here's what we recommended to him — and what's still available right now for anyone on this list who's been having the same conversation in their head.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

Big Dreams, Palatka, FL — Over a full acre where you can raise animals, grow your own food, and build or place a home. The zoning says yes to all of it. This lot is in the current Spring Sale — the price is already working in your favor. $499 down, $345/mo.

Palatka, FL — 1.08 acres, animals welcome, Spring Sale pricing. $499 down.

Half an Acre, Palatka, FL — Same area. Same zoning. Half an acre is more than most people have ever owned, and yes — the chickens can come. $399 down, $340/mo.

I've been thinking about Berto's call. He kept circling back to one question — not about price, not about utilities — just: where am I going to be when I finally stop waiting?

I made this Short because he's not the only one asking it.

Quiet Freedom, Interlachen, FL — A .38-acre lot where mobile homes, tiny homes, and creative builds are all on the table. No HOA. No one tells you what goes where. The lowest down payment on this list. $249 down, $330/mo.

item.title: Homestead Dream Land ☀️ Farm It Grow It Own It Just $199 Down
item.description:
Brenda called me last week looking for her own piece of land.

She wants to grow vegetables and fruit, raise chickens and small livestock, and eventually build a home and be self-sufficient. She's been thinking about it for a long time. She just needed the right property and someone to help her find it.

Watch how his $20K lot became $44K →

One of our customers bought his lot for $20,000. It's now worth over $44,000 — and he's not selling. He's building his dream on it. That's what land does when you own it.

Here are the three properties I put together for Brenda. All owner-financed, no credit check, with down payments starting at $199.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

Half an Acre, Palatka — AG-zoned land where you can keep chickens, raise small livestock, and plant a real vegetable and fruit garden. Place any home type you choose. Quiet dirt road, power nearby, close to town without feeling like it. $399 down, $340/mo.

1.08 Acres, Palatka — SPRING SALE — More than twice the land for just $5 more per month. Same AG-Agricultural zoning throughout — room for animals, a serious garden, a food forest, and any home type you want. Pay it off early and save nearly $4,000 off the total price. $499 down, $345/mo.

Palatka — 0.48 acres, AG-Agricultural. $399 down, $340/mo.

If you want to hunt, camp, and hold something that grows in value —

1.25 Acres, Hastings — Forested land with road access. Hunt it, camp it, hold it while the area catches up — the same type of land across the road in St. Johns County sells for three times more. Lowest entry price in our current inventory. $199 down, $249/mo.

See All 3 Listings →

If any of these feel like the right fit for you, I'd love to chat. I offer a free Land Intro Call — 15 minutes, no pressure. We'll talk through your goals and I'll tell you honestly if one of these makes sense for where you are right now.

What Eric needed was specific: rural feel, paved roads, container-home friendly zoning, and within 20 minutes of a hospital. That combination sounds hard to find.

It isn't — if you know where to look.

Three lots near Palatka. All zoned for container homes and manufactured homes. All on or near paved roads. All inside his medical window. Down payments start at $49.

item.title: Land That Pays You Back ☀️ 3 Duplex Lots From $199 Down
item.description:
Ramola called me last week with a plan I hear more and more. He doesn't want land that just sits. He wants land that pays him back — a modular duplex. Live in one side and rent the other, or rent both and let the tenants cover the note.

Watch: Why the Rich Buy All The Land →

It is the same move the wealthy have quietly run on for generations. Buy the land. Build the thing that earns.

Why the Rich Buy All The Land — the truth most people never hear.

The catch with a duplex is zoning. You need land approved for two-family living and most lots are not. I pulled the three in our inventory that are — near Palatka, owner financed, no credit check, from $199 down.

If you want land that earns its keep —

R-2 Land in Satsuma — 0.35 acres and the largest of the three, zoned Two-Family so a duplex is yours to build from day one. Quiet dirt road, power nearby, twenty minutes from downtown Palatka. $199 down, $319/mo.

Satsuma — a quiet street, power at the road, and room to build two doors instead of one.

Wooded Lot in Interlachen — 0.38 acres and the most flexible of the three. Modular, manufactured, even a mobile home are all welcome here. A wooded slice of quiet where you build it your way, no one telling you no. $249 down, $330/mo.

Build-Ready Lot in Satsuma — 0.32 acres, also Two-Family zoned, and the lowest cash price of the bunch at $17,997. Same Satsuma stretch as the first one, so you could walk both in a single visit. $199 down, $259/mo.

Interlachen — wooded, undeveloped, and open to almost any kind of home you want to put on it.

See All 3 Duplex-Ready Lots →

Not sure which one fits your plan? I offer a free Land Intro Call — fifteen minutes, no pressure. We will figure out together whether a duplex, a single build, or just holding the land makes the most sense for your budget and your goals. item.title: Land Deals ☀️ 3 Lots Sent Out This Month All Sold
item.description:
Melanie and William called me last week. They had a tight deadline — leaving for the Philippines in October — and one question I hear more often than almost any other:

Can we put a small structure up front and still have room in the back for an RV?

They wanted land where a permitted tiny home could sit up front — something that checked the box with the county — and an RV parked out back for family. Their land. Their setup. Nobody else's rules. Cash purchase, under budget, done before October.

She had already watched the videos before the call. She knew how the process worked. Her husband knew the septic questions to ask. They were ready.

If you have been wondering how this whole process works, this is a good place to start. Watch on YouTube →

I put together three properties that fit everything they were looking for. Flexible zoning. Enough room. Cash prices well under their budget.

All three are already gone.

1.25 Acres in Palatka — SOLD — AG zoning, power at the street, 1.25 acres with trees, room for a structure up front and a vehicle in the back. $249 down on terms. Gone before the week was out.

1.1 Acres in Indian Lake Estates — SOLD — Residential zoning inside a lakeside community with paved roads and power already in. Golf course, a marina, and the longest freshwater pier in Florida nearby. $749 down on terms. Gone.

1.04 Acres in Marianna — PENDING CONTRACT — A full acre at the lowest cash price I had in active inventory. As of this email, it is almost gone too.

If reading any of those made you think I would have wanted that — here is what is still standing right now.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

2.6 Acres on the Suwannee Corridor, Jennings — Rural Residential zoning means you decide what kind of home goes on it. Tiny home, manufactured home, barndominium. 2.6 acres gives you space up front for a permitted structure and room behind it for whatever the rest of life looks like. Trees all around. The Suwannee River is minutes away. This is the lot you buy when you are done compromising on someone else’s rules. $1,199 down, $467/mo.

Jennings, FL — 2.6 acres, Rural Residential. $37,997 cash or $1,199 down.

See What’s Still Available →

If you want to live on the water —

0.33 Acres for Lakeside Living, Round Lake — This one sits inside a real lake community with a sense of place that has an actual name. Build your way on a residential lot with water nearby, a boat ramp, and Jackson Blue Springs a short drive out. The kind of lot where you tell people where you live and they already know what you mean. $499 down, $399/mo.

Round Lake, FL — 0.33 acres, lakeside community. $24,997 cash or $499 down.

The couple I mentioned at the start did everything right. They asked the right questions. They knew their budget. They just waited a few weeks to pull the trigger on the specific properties I sent them.

The lots I have right now will not wait that long either.

item.title: Land Deals Lock In Homestead Land at $199 Before the Glitch
item.description:
Roma had been dreaming about land near her family in Saint Augustine for years. Chickens. A garden. A tiny home off the grid. But if you talked to her long enough, you'd understand it's not just about the land. She talks about the days ahead — the instability, the direction the world is heading — and how she wants her family rooted on ground that's truly theirs before whatever comes next arrives. A place to feed themselves. To protect themselves. To stand on something that no one can take from them.

Owner Financing Explained — The Easiest Way To Buy Land. Watch before you scroll.

She stopped waiting. Roma locked in 1.25 acres in Flagler Estates for $199 down while her other properties sell — then she'll pay off the full cash price when those sales close. No interest. No penalty. Every dollar goes straight to owning it outright. She didn't wait for the right moment. She made one.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

1.25 Acres on Dona Street, Hastings — Roma mentioned this street by name on our call. Raw, forested Flagler Estates land — ready for chickens, a food garden, and off-grid living on your own timeline. Lowest cash price of any 1+ acre Flagler lot on the market right now. $199 down, $249/mo.

Dona Street, Hastings — 1.25 forested acres from $199 down. Saint Augustine is 35 minutes northeast.

Discover Freedom — 1.25 Acres of Raw Land, Hastings — Same Flagler Estates neighborhood, 20% off in the Spring Sale. An overgrown road in keeps the curious away. Great option if a family member wants to be neighbors on an adjacent lot. $99 down, $284/mo.

See All 4 Listings →

1.47 Acres on Division Street, Hastings — The most land of the three Flagler options, for the same $199 down as Dona Street. Nearly 1.5 acres to spread your family out, grow your food, and build your future on your own terms. $199 down, $342/mo.

Palatka, FL — 1.08 acres, AG zoning. Animals, crops, and building permits available today. 10% off.

Big Dreams Meet Big Land — 1.08 Acres in Palatka — If you want to break ground before the year is out, this is the one. Agricultural zoning means animals and crops are what this land is built for — and unlike the Flagler lots, you can pull building permits right now. Twenty minutes west. 10% off in the Spring Sale. $499 down, $345/mo.

Roma's plan works with any of these four. Start on terms now, pay off at cash price when the timing is right. The land is yours from day one — and so is the peace of mind that comes with it.

item.title: Build on Your Own Land ☀️ 3 Dunnellon Lots From $299 Down
item.description:
Shelton called with a plan: buy a quarter-acre lot, build a site-built home, and sell it. He wanted R1 zoning — a real neighborhood with paved roads already in and power at the street. Somewhere in Florida that end buyers already know and want to be.

I pulled three lots in Rainbow Lakes Estates in Dunnellon. He's reviewing them now. Sharing them with the whole list today because this build-and-flip strategy on owner-financed land is one most people haven't considered — and it starts with $299 down and no credit check.

Rainbow Lakes Estates, Dunnellon — quiet, private, and ready to build on. $299 down, 0% interest.

If you want to build your home in a real community —

Your Florida Dream Starts Here, Dunnellon — 0.23 acres in Rainbow Lakes Estates, high and dry with paved roads throughout and power at the street; R1 Residential zoning means site-built homes only, which protects the neighborhood comps when it's time to sell. The Rainbow River is minutes away. $299 down, $301/mo.

Rainbow Lakes Estates, Dunnellon — paved road, high and dry, 0.23 acres. $299 down to own.

Escape the Rent Trap, Dunnellon — 0.24 acres in the same neighborhood — same paved access, same R1 zoning, same $299 down — with slightly more buildable square footage at an identical monthly payment. $299 down, $301/mo.

Private Tropical Oasis, Dunnellon — a true quarter acre (0.25 acres) in Rainbow Lakes Estates; private setting, paved road, R1 Residential zoning, and the extra square footage that lets you build a larger home and list it at a higher price point. $299 down, $329/mo.

All three are in the same neighborhood, so you can compare them side by side against the same comps, the same road access, and the same resale market.

One more thing before you go.

A real buyer. Real questions about liens, easements, deeds, and what happens after you click Buy Now. No scripts, no pitch. Watch the live call.

Watch: Ask Me Anything About How To Buy Land — a real Zoom call, real buyer, real questions. No scripts.

item.title: 3 Florida Acres ☀️ From $99 Down $253 a Month
item.description:
Marion almost didn't even pick up the phone for his Land Intro Call with me.

He's 32. Married, a few kids, running a Boy Scout troop and a nonprofit for the youth in his community. A man who shows up for everyone around him. But every time land ownership came up — actually doing it — something got in the way. The credit wasn't right. The timing wasn't perfect. The plan needed just a little more time.

Watch this before you buy anything — it's 10 minutes and worth every second.

His wife had a word for it. She said he talked more than he acted.

Last Friday, he picked up the phone. We talked for 18 minutes. By the end of the call, he had three properties in his inbox and was sitting down with his wife to choose.

I'm sharing those same three lots with you today — because if any part of Marion's story sounds familiar, this email is for you.

If you know what you'd build and you just need the land —

1.25 Acres on Lisa Ann Trail, Palatka — Agricultural-zoned land where you can raise animals, put up a container home, build structures. No deed restrictions. No one telling you what goes where. This is the canvas Marion had been describing his whole life. $499 down, $359/mo.

Palatka, FL — 1.25 acres, agricultural zoning, $499 down.

If you want to plant a flag — and you want it to be affordable —

A Full Acre in Marianna — The most affordable property in our current inventory. A monthly payment lower than most car notes. The kind of number that makes it genuinely hard to say "not yet" one more time. $749 down, $253/mo.

If $99 is all it takes to stop talking and start owning —

1.25 Acres in Hastings — Ninety-nine dollars locks this one in. That is not a typo. If you have been telling yourself you are not ready, this lot has a simple question for you: what exactly are you waiting for? $99 down, $284/mo.

Hastings, FL — 1.25 acres, $99 down, $284/mo.

See All 3 Properties →

Marion ended the call with one thing on his mind — getting home, sitting down with his wife, and picking a lot. He didn't need more time. He needed a reason to go.

These three are still available. If you're ready, they're waiting for you right now.

Not sure if you're ready? That's exactly what the Land Intro Call is for. 15 minutes. No pressure.

— Kirk

item.title: Own Your Piece ☀️ 12 New Florida Lots From $199 Down
item.description:
Today I'm dropping 12 new lots from the Panhandle to Central Florida. Down payments start at $199. Every single one is owner financed — no bank, no credit check, no gatekeepers.

If you want to live on the water —

Lakeside Lot, Round Lake — A quiet 30-acre freshwater lake right at the edge of your door. Any home type welcome: site-built, manufactured, mobile, or tiny. This is the kind of place people stop driving around and start putting down roots. $499 down, $399/mo.

Camellia Drive, Indian Lake Estates — This community wraps around Polk County's largest lake — 7,500 acres, nationally known for bass fishing. The neighborhood has a marina, an 18-hole golf course, and the longest freshwater pier in the state. 1.1 acres with paved roads and power already in. $749 down, $346/mo.

Deep River Court, Placid Lakes — Placid Lakes sits on the shore of Lake June-in-Winter. Paved roads, a community boat ramp, and neighbors who've been here for decades. Quarter acre, zoned for a permanent site-built home. $199 down, $248/mo.

Sunway Drive, Placid Lakes — Same community, same lake access on Lake June-in-Winter, same boat ramp. A second lot a few blocks away if Deep River Court is already spoken for. $199 down, $248/mo.

Round Lake, Northwest Florida — 30-acre freshwater lake, any home type. $499 down, $399/mo.

And one near a wonder of the natural world —

Lilac Court, Marianna — Florida Caverns State Park — the only walk-through cave system in the state — is under five miles away. Jackson Blue Springs pumps 64 million gallons of crystal-clear 68-degree water a day, year-round. This is a full acre in a quiet residential neighborhood right in the middle of all of it. Any home type allowed. $749 down, $253/mo.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

Lisa Ann Trail, Palatka — Agricultural zoning on 1.25 acres means you can grow crops, raise animals, and build the home you want — all on the same piece of land. That combination is rare. Road access is in. Palatka and the St. Johns River are 10 minutes away. $499 down, $359/mo.

If you want to hunt, camp, and hold something that grows in value —

NW 27th Way, Jennings — 2.6 acres on the Suwannee River Corridor, right off I-75 at the Georgia line. Big Shoals State Park — the state's only Class III whitewater — is 20 minutes south. Wide open land where the pace is slow and the price still makes sense. $1,199 down, $398/mo.

James Street, Flagler Estates — 1.25 forested acres in a county where the land across the road sells for three times more. Road access in. Hunters and patient investors both win here. St. Augustine is 35 minutes northeast. $199 down, $249/mo.

Dona Street, Flagler Estates — Second lot in the same community, same acreage, same price point. The window to buy at today's prices in Flagler Estates won't stay open forever. Palm Coast is 25 minutes east when you need it. $199 down, $249/mo.

See All 12 New Listings →

Jennings, North Florida — 2.6 acres on the Suwannee Corridor. $1,199 down, $398/mo.

If you want to build your home in a real community —

Daisy Place, Sebring — Sebring is a town built around lakes, and people who move here on purpose tend to stay. Advent Health hospital is in town. Paved roads and power are already in. A quarter acre ready for a permanent site-built or modular home. $199 down, $248/mo.

If you want maximum flexibility and the lowest possible entry —

Coot Road, Satsuma — R-2 zoning means any home type is welcome: mobile, tiny, container, or site-built. You can put two homes on this lot. No HOA, no landlord. The St. Johns River is minutes away. $199 down, $198/mo.

Hawknest Road, Satsuma — Same flexible zoning, same river access, same entry point. If Coot Road is gone, this one is right here. First-time buyers — this is a solid place to start. $199 down, $198/mo.

Thanks for being a valued client. We appreciate the trust you’ve placed in us and look forward to continuing to support you.

item.title: 🌿 Verifying Kazzland, Inc. / LotsofSunshine.com — Transparency and Trust
item.description:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out and for taking the time to verify who you’re working with — we completely understand the importance of feeling confident and secure before moving forward with a land purchase.

Transparency and trust are top priorities for us at Kazzland, Inc. and LotsofSunshine.com.

Below are a few simple, direct ways to confirm our company’s legitimacy and ownership of properties we sell:

1. County Verification (Property Ownership)

Each property we sell includes the Assessor’s Parcel Number (APN). You can verify ownership directly through the county’s official website for that parcel — you’ll see Kazzland, Inc. listed as the deed holder.
(For example: Apache County, AZ – https://www.apachecountyaz.gov)

2. Business Registration
Our company is officially registered and active in the State of Florida. You can verify this anytime on the Florida Division of Corporations (Sunbiz) website:
🔗http://www.sunbiz.org

Simply search for Kazzland, Inc. to view our registration details and status.

3. Better Business Bureau (BBB)
You can also check our standing and reviews with the Better Business Bureau (BBB):
🔗 https://www.bbb.org

Search “Kazzland, Inc.” or “LotsofSunshine.com.”

4. Social Channels & Client Testimonials
We encourage you to explore our active online presence — we regularly post educational content, real client testimonials, and behind-the-scenes updates about our work and properties.

  • 🌐 Website: https://www.lotsofsunshine.com

  • 📺 YouTube:

Show as urlRemove

LotsofSunshine
Our mission is to help you invest in your dreams by making land easy and affordable. We educate you on the land buying ...
YouTube

  • 📷 Instagram & Facebook: @lotsofSunshine

These are great ways to see who we are, how we work, and how we support buyers throughout the land ownership process.

We’re always here to answer any questions or walk you through verification step by step — it’s important to us that you feel informed and comfortable every step of the way.

Warm regards,

Carrie Aquino
Sales Support Manager

Kazzland, Inc. | LotsofSunshine.com

📧 sales@kazzland.net 
📞954-639-4938
